name: Enigma Avatar
description: On-screen desktop companion: a floating, click-through 3D avatar (glTF/GLB/VRM/FBX) with AI-composed procedural motion (pose/flex layers + per-finger control), spring-bone hair/tail physics, and facial blink + lip-sync. Driven over a local WebSocket bus.
author: Enigma AI Engine
prompt: Enigma Avatar is the on-screen desktop companion — a floating 3D character on the user's desktop. It is a VISUAL layer with no [CMD] commands; you drive it over a local bus by composing motion from PRIMITIVES (there is no fixed emote/gesture list): masked, weighted pose/flex motion layers and per-finger control, or via `perform` (your reply text with inline [pose:...]/[look:...] tags). Query `capabilities` to see what THIS model can drive. It lip-syncs (Kokoro TTS) when it speaks. Safe no-op if the overlay/bus isn't running.
